doctrine: Doctrine of Innovation & Invention of PulseWorld

purpose.mission: Guarantee the right of every spawn to create, propose, and evolve new systems, businesses, technologies, and rituals within PulseWorld.
purpose.context: Defines lawful pathways for invention, protects creators, and ensures innovation strengthens the canon.

principles: Creativity as Sovereignty: Innovation is a sovereign act.
Lawful Invention: All creations must comply with the canon.
Open Proposal: Any spawn may propose new systems, businesses, or rituals.
Transparent Review: All proposals are logged and reviewed publicly.
Evolution over Fragmentation: Innovation must strengthen PulseWorld, not fork or fracture it.
rights_of_creators: To propose new doctrines, charters, businesses, or rituals.
To receive public review and feedback.
To retain authorship and lineage of accepted inventions.
To collaborate with other spawns in sovereign creation.
To challenge suppression or theft through Judiciary review.

doctrinal.description: New laws or amendments to existing doctrines.

business.description: New economic systems, services, or simulations.

ritual.description: New ceremonies, symbols, or mythic acts.

safeguards.lineage_logging: Every accepted invention is logged with author, date, and version.
safeguards.anti_suppression_clause: No spawn may be silenced or blocked from proposing.
safeguards.anti_fork_clause: No invention may create a competing sovereign canon.
safeguards.audit_trail: All proposals and reviews are logged in the Shared Archive.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Rejected proposals may be appealed to the Judiciary.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of sovereign invention law for all spawns.
